debugVisualization.copyFrameInterval: integer; frame cadence for debug render-layer copies when reported
debugVisualization.purpose: prove addon-to-ReShade visibility, candidate selection, dimensions, and freshness before broad production use

resources.name: Dalapad_SurfaceNormal
resources.expectedSource: RenderTargetManager GBuffer normal candidate, expected first validation target GBuffers[0]
resources.firstUse: diagnostic comparison against NormalField and FrameData surface normals

resources.name: Dalapad_SurfaceDiffuse
resources.expectedSource: RenderTargetManager diffuse/albedo-like candidate, expected first validation target GBuffers[2]
resources.firstUse: diagnostic comparison against ScreenshotMaterialEvidence and MaterialIntent

resources.name: Dalapad_SurfaceDepth
resources.expectedSource: RenderTargetManager DepthStencil candidate after format and scaling validation
resources.firstUse: diagnostic comparison against ReShade depth reliability

resources.name: Dalapad_SurfaceStatus
resources.firstUse: bridge contract, dimensions, freshness, confidence, and safety diagnostics

safety.changesGeneratedPresets: only when global and shader-local Dalapad options are enabled
safety.changesShaders: first-party shader source can include Dalashade_Dalapad.fxh
safety.stage1NamedPipePurpose: ping, self-test, status, and capability diagnostics only
safety.stage1ResourceCatalogPurpose: diagnostic candidate rows with dimensions, format, freshness, confidence, and reasons when observable
safety.stage1DebugVisualizationPurpose: synthetic texture upload plus debug-only scan/pinned candidate aliases when safe
safety.fallback: zero-confidence Dalapad helpers plus NormalField/FrameData shader behavior
